surface_verification.justification: Library/CLI input-sanitisation change (grade open_target seam + adopt --project-root argparse type); no application runtime surface. Verified by new unit tests and the full grade (291) + adopt (349) suites green. E2E is Advisory at small without touches_io_boundary.

behaviors.behavior: strip_surrounding_quotes removes a balanced surrounding double OR single quote pair
behaviors.evidence: grade tests/test_normalize_input.py (17) + tests/test_resolve_target.py regression; adopt tests/test_cli_paths.py (15)

behaviors.behavior: an inner apostrophe (o'brien) is preserved; only the surrounding pair is stripped
behaviors.evidence: grade tests/test_normalize_input.py (17) + tests/test_resolve_target.py regression; adopt tests/test_cli_paths.py (15)

behaviors.behavior: a lone or mismatched surrounding quote is left untouched
behaviors.evidence: grade tests/test_normalize_input.py (17) + tests/test_resolve_target.py regression; adopt tests/test_cli_paths.py (15)

behaviors.behavior: whitespace is trimmed both outside and inside the quote pair
behaviors.evidence: grade tests/test_normalize_input.py (17) + tests/test_resolve_target.py regression; adopt tests/test_cli_paths.py (15)

behaviors.behavior: empty / whitespace-only / empty-quote-pair collapse to empty string
behaviors.evidence: grade tests/test_normalize_input.py (17) + tests/test_resolve_target.py regression; adopt tests/test_cli_paths.py (15)

behaviors.behavior: only ONE balanced pair is stripped (nested quotes keep the inner pair)
grade open_target resolves a double/single-quoted local path identically to the plain path
adopt unquoted_path returns a clean pathlib.Path from a quoted string
argparse type=unquoted_path strips a quoted --project-root end-to-end
the 4 adopt CLIs (setup_adopt, analyze_codebase, validate_adoption, seed_adopt_compliance) wire type=unquoted_path
behaviors.evidence: covered by TestArgparseIntegration which exercises the identical one-token argparse mechanism wired into all 4 CLIs; no per-CLI branching logic exists to test
